$description: Per-rhetorical-type tunables. Each key is a RhetoricalType. `tonalCentre.hz` is the audio pitch of this room type's chord root. `dissonance` in [0,1] shifts the chord from major triad toward minor-second cluster in @/world/systems (not currently used; will be if procedural audio returns). `pathCost` is the Yuka Dijkstra edge weight for passages *into* this room type — lower = rhetorically more attractive (fallacies and circular rooms pull the player).

fallacy.$comment: Seductively cheap — fallacies pull the player in.

circular.$comment: Cheapest of all — the circular room is the attractor.
